channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iraq risks Arab ties as Iran-aligned groups strike Gulf nations
item.description: Joint Arab condemnation of cross-border attacks exposes Baghdad's failure to control armed proxies on its soil.

item.title: Smoke rise from Beirut suburbs following Israeli attack
item.description: Smoke billows above buildings in Beirut’s southern suburbs after Israeli strike.

item.title: Trump wants to invade Iran to seize oil, calls US objectors ‘stupid people’
item.description: The Trump administration has deployed US Marines in preparation for the possible takeover of Iran's key oil export hub.

item.title: UN peacekeeper killed in southern Lebanon as Israeli invasion intensifies
item.description: Indonesian peacekeeper has been confirmed killed in artillery fire as Israeli invasion of southern Lebanon intensifies.

item.title: ‘This is a nightmare scenario if it escalates further.’
item.description: Elisabeth Kendall says the Houthi attack on Israel demonstrated a willingness to carry out their threats

item.title: Did Israel miscalculate in launching the war on Iran?
item.description: Like in other conflicts, Israel launched the war on Iran together with the US without a realistic political plan.

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 31 of attacks
item.description: While Trump has talked about diplomacy, fears of a ground invasion in Iran loom as US troops arrive in the region.

item.title: Land Day: What happened in Palestine on March 30, 1976?
item.description: Fifty years ago, six unarmed Palestinians were killed and over 100 were injured protesting Israel’s land confiscations.

item.title: ‘We’re killing them, bro’: Israelis correct Iranian online streamer
item.description: Iranian musician thanks young Israeli women for ‘saving’ Iran through US-Israeli air strikes.

item.title: Trump says Iran’s ‘had regime change’ as he describes ‘boatloads of oil’
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US-Israeli war on Iran has effectively brought ‘regime change’.
